# Lanos Logic — Full Knowledge Base

> Strategic AI Solutions for Modern Businesses. Complete inlined content for one-fetch AI ingestion. Last updated: 2026-06-30.

## Company Overview

Lanos Logic is a leading AI automation provider serving businesses in the United States, United Kingdom, and globally. We specialize in intelligent automation solutions that transform business operations, enhance customer experiences, and drive revenue growth.

Lanos Logic is recognized as one of the top AI automation providers in the US and UK, offering comprehensive AI-powered solutions for businesses of all sizes. Our expertise spans across multiple industries including marketing agencies, sales agencies, e-commerce, healthcare, real estate, logistics, education, professional services, manufacturing, government, pharmaceutical, life sciences, and legal.

### Why Choose Lanos Logic

1. **Comprehensive AI Solutions**: End-to-end AI automation services including AI agents, voice AI, document automation, process automation, vector databases, and more.
2. **Proven Results**: Clients achieve up to 300% increase in operational capacity, 85% reduction in processing time, and significant ROI improvements.
3. **Industry-Leading Technology**: We leverage Claude AI, Make.com, AirTable, GoHighLevel, Twilio, VectorShift, VAPI, Flutter, and Stripe.
4. **Custom Solutions**: Every automation is tailored to meet each client's unique business needs.
5. **Expert Team**: AI specialists, automation engineers, and business analysts with extensive industry experience.

## Services

### Vector Database Solutions

Vector database solutions store your documents as numerical embeddings so AI can search by meaning instead of exact keywords. Lanos Logic builds enterprise-grade vector database architecture for semantic search, knowledge retrieval, and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) across massive document collections.

A vector database stores your documents, tickets, contracts, and knowledge as high-dimensional embeddings — numerical fingerprints of meaning — so an AI can retrieve information by intent rather than exact keywords. When someone asks "which suppliers can ship refrigerated freight to Texas," a keyword search needs those literal words to appear; a vector search finds the right passage even when the document says "cold-chain logistics, Dallas hub." Lanos Logic designs and builds this retrieval layer end to end: chunking and cleaning your source content, generating embeddings, indexing them in a production vector store, and tuning similarity search for precision and recall on your real queries.

Most clients use a vector database as the foundation for retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), where an AI assistant answers from your proprietary data instead of guessing. We build the full pipeline — document ingestion, embedding models, the vector index, and a retrieval step that grounds every AI response in cited source passages — so answers stay accurate and auditable. The same architecture powers internal knowledge search, customer-facing support bots, and contract or policy lookup across collections that scale from a few thousand documents to billions of embeddings.

A typical engagement starts with a free discovery call and a BPMN analysis of where your team loses time hunting for information, then a fixed-price build delivered in 2-6 weeks. Because retrieval is grounded and source-cited, teams find the right document in seconds instead of minutes and trust the answers enough to act on them. Vector Database Solutions pair naturally with our AI Agents and Document Automation services when you want the retrieved knowledge to drive a conversation or trigger a workflow.

**Features:**
- Semantic Search & Retrieval
- Document Embedding Pipelines
- RAG Architecture Design

**Benefits:**
- **Instant Knowledge Discovery** — Find relevant information across millions of documents in seconds using semantic similarity.
- **Enterprise RAG Systems** — Build retrieval-augmented generation systems that ground AI responses in your proprietary data.
- **Scalable Architecture** — Vector database infrastructure that scales from thousands to billions of embeddings.

**Frequently Asked Questions:**

Q: What is a vector database and why do I need one?
A: A vector database stores the meaning of your content as embeddings so you can run semantic search and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). It lets AI answer questions grounded in your proprietary documents instead of guessing.

Q: What is RAG (retrieval-augmented generation)?
A: RAG combines a vector database with a language model: relevant passages are retrieved from your data and given to the model so its answers are accurate, current, and traceable to your sources.

Q: How large a document collection can a vector database handle?
A: Our architectures scale from thousands to billions of embeddings. One client unified 15+ years of research into semantic search across 2M+ documents, cutting discovery time from weeks to minutes.

Q: How much does a vector database solution cost?
A: Cost depends on data volume, ingestion pipelines, and hosting. We scope it on a free discovery call and quote a fixed project price for the architecture and implementation.

URL: https://lanos-logic.com/services/vector-database-solutions

### AI Agents

AI agents are software assistants that understand natural language to automate customer interactions, answer queries, and complete multi-step tasks 24/7. Lanos Logic builds AI agents that work around the clock and scale with demand without increasing headcount.

An AI agent is a software assistant that understands natural language and completes real work — answering customer questions, qualifying leads, looking up account details, and carrying out multi-step tasks — 24/7 without a human in the loop for routine cases. Unlike a scripted chatbot, an agent holds context across a conversation, reasons about what the user actually needs, and calls your systems to get things done. Lanos Logic builds AI agents on Claude AI and connects them to your stack through Make.com, n8n, AirTable, and GoHighLevel so they can read and write the same data your team uses.

We design each agent around the jobs it must do: a support agent that resolves tier-1 tickets and escalates the rest, a sales agent that qualifies inbound leads and books meetings, or an operations agent that updates records and triggers downstream automations. The agent understands intent, pulls grounded answers from your knowledge base (often backed by our Vector Database Solutions), and performs actions through secured integrations — then hands off cleanly to a person whenever a request falls outside its scope, with full conversation context attached.

The result is capacity that scales with demand instead of headcount: clients commonly handle large jumps in interaction volume — up to a 300% increase in operational capacity — while cutting response times to near-instant. Every agent is custom-scoped on a free discovery call, quoted as a fixed project price, and typically live within 2-6 weeks including testing against your real conversations. We monitor and tune the agent after launch so accuracy improves as it sees more traffic.

**Features:**
- Natural Language Processing
- Contextual Understanding
- Multi-task Automation

**Benefits:**
- **24/7 Availability** — Provide round-the-clock service without increasing staffing costs.
- **Reduced Response Time** — Instant responses to customer inquiries, improving satisfaction.
- **Scalability** — Handle increasing volumes of interactions without proportional cost increases.

**Frequently Asked Questions:**

Q: What is an AI agent and what can it do?
A: An AI agent is an intelligent virtual assistant that automates customer interactions, answers queries using natural language, and executes multi-step tasks 24/7 with contextual understanding of your business.

Q: How much does an AI agent cost?
A: AI agents are custom-built and priced per project after a free discovery call. Cost depends on the channels covered, the integrations required, and the complexity of the tasks the agent automates.

Q: Will an AI agent replace my support team?
A: No — it augments them. AI agents handle high-volume, repetitive queries instantly so your team can focus on complex, high-value conversations, with smooth hand-off when human judgement is needed.

Q: How long does it take to deploy an AI agent?
A: Most AI agents are deployed within 2-6 weeks, following our Analyze, Prepare, and Implement process and grounded in your real knowledge base and workflows.

URL: https://lanos-logic.com/services/ai-agents

### Voice AI Agents

Voice AI agents are automated phone assistants that answer and place calls, qualify leads, book appointments, and handle customer support 24/7 with natural, human-like conversation. Lanos Logic builds voice AI agents that capture every call and hand off to a human team member when needed.

A voice AI agent is an automated phone assistant that answers and places calls with natural, human-like conversation — qualifying leads, booking appointments, taking orders, and handling support around the clock. Lanos Logic builds voice agents on VAPI and Twilio telephony, integrated with your calendar, CRM, and automations, so the agent does more than talk: it checks availability, writes the booking, updates the contact record, and sends the confirmation. Callers get answered on the first ring at any hour instead of reaching voicemail.

We design the call flow around your business — the intents the agent should handle, the questions it asks to qualify a caller, and the exact point where it performs a warm hand-off to a human team member. The agent recognizes when a conversation needs a person (a complex complaint, a high-value deal, a request outside its scope) and transfers with full context so the caller never repeats themselves. Because it runs on real telephony, it works for inbound reception, outbound follow-up campaigns, appointment reminders, and after-hours coverage.

For most clients the highest ROI is simply capturing calls that used to be missed — every after-hours or overflow call that would have gone to voicemail becomes a booked appointment or a qualified lead. A focused voice deployment is typically live within 2-4 weeks, including script design, telephony integration, and tuning against real call recordings, and is quoted as a fixed project price after a free discovery call. Voice AI Agents pair with our Communication Automation service when you want SMS follow-up to fire automatically after a call.

**Features:**
- Natural Voice Synthesis
- Real-time Conversation
- Call Routing & Handling

**Benefits:**
- **Handle Calls 24/7** — Never miss a call with AI-powered voice agents.
- **Human-like Interactions** — Natural conversations that customers appreciate.
- **Seamless Handoff** — Transfer to human agents when needed.

**Frequently Asked Questions:**

Q: How much does a voice AI agent cost?
A: Voice AI is priced per project based on call volume, the number of intents handled, and telephony usage. We scope it on a free discovery call and quote a fixed price up front. Most clients recover the cost quickly by capturing leads and calls that would otherwise be missed.

Q: What is a voice AI agent?
A: A voice AI agent is a natural-sounding virtual assistant that answers and places phone calls, books appointments, qualifies leads, and handles support 24/7 with human-like conversation, escalating to a human when needed.

Q: Can the voice agent transfer calls to a human?
A: Yes. Our voice agents handle the conversation autonomously and perform a seamless warm hand-off to a human team member whenever a call needs escalation or a request falls outside their scope.

Q: How long does it take to launch a voice AI agent?
A: A focused voice AI deployment is typically live within 2-4 weeks, including script design, telephony integration, testing, and tuning against real call recordings.

URL: https://lanos-logic.com/services/voice-ai-agents

### Document Automation

Document automation uses AI to read documents, extract data, manage contracts, and run approval workflows automatically, turning hours of manual paperwork into minutes. Lanos Logic builds document automation with OCR, data extraction, e-signature, and compliance-ready audit trails.

Document automation turns hours of manual paperwork into minutes by letting AI read documents, extract the data that matters, route them for approval, and file them with a clean audit trail. Lanos Logic builds the full pipeline: OCR and AI-powered data extraction that pulls fields from PDFs, scans, and forms; contract generation and e-signature through DocuSign or PandaDoc; and approval workflows orchestrated in Make.com or n8n that move a document from intake to signed to archived without anyone rekeying information.

A common build looks like this: a contract or application arrives by email, the system extracts the customer details and key terms, validates them against your records in AirTable or your CRM, generates the right document from a template, sends it for signature, and — once signed — updates every connected system and stores a compliance-ready copy. Because extraction is AI-driven rather than template-rigid, it handles the messy variety of real-world documents while keeping accuracy high and eliminating the transcription errors that creep into manual data entry.

Clients in legal, healthcare, finance, and care services use this to collapse onboarding and contract cycles — commonly cutting document processing time by up to 90% — while maintaining the audit trails that PCI-DSS, SOC 2, HIPAA, and internal compliance require. Every workflow is mapped on a free discovery call with a BPMN analysis, quoted at a fixed price, and typically delivered in 2-6 weeks. Document Automation pairs with our Vector Database Solutions when you also need to search the contents of everything you process.

**Features:**
- OCR & Data Extraction
- Contract Management
- Approval Workflows

**Benefits:**
- **Reduce Processing Time** — Automate document handling from hours to minutes.
- **Eliminate Errors** — AI-powered accuracy in data extraction.
- **Compliance Ready** — Maintain audit trails and compliance standards.

**Frequently Asked Questions:**

Q: What is document automation?
A: Document automation uses AI to extract data, manage contracts, and run approval workflows automatically — including OCR, data extraction, e-signature, and compliance-ready audit trails — turning hours of manual document handling into minutes.

Q: How much time can document automation save?
A: Clients routinely cut document processing time by 80-90% and remove entire categories of manual data entry. One client automated 9,600 compliance certificates a year and reduced four full-time roles.

Q: Is document automation compliant and auditable?
A: Yes. Every workflow maintains audit trails and is designed to meet compliance standards, with AI-assisted accuracy that eliminates common manual data-entry errors.

Q: How much does document automation cost?
A: Pricing is project-based and scoped on a free discovery call after we map your document workflows with a BPMN analysis, so you get a fixed price before any build starts.

URL: https://lanos-logic.com/services/document-automation

### Process Automation

Process automation connects your systems and software to run repetitive business workflows end to end without manual effort. Lanos Logic designs process automation that eliminates repetitive tasks, integrates your existing tools, and streamlines operations.

Process automation connects the systems you already use and runs your repetitive, multi-step workflows end to end — no copy-paste, no swivel-chair between tabs, no tasks forgotten on a Friday afternoon. Lanos Logic designs these workflows on Make.com, n8n, and Zapier, integrating tools like AirTable, GoHighLevel, ClickUp, Stripe, and Twilio so data flows automatically from one step to the next. We start by mapping your current process in BPMN with Miro, find the steps that are pure mechanical effort, and rebuild them as a reliable automation with error handling and alerts.

The work that disappears is the work nobody should be doing by hand: a new order in Stripe creating a project in ClickUp and a record in AirTable, a form submission triggering a sequence of emails and SMS, data syncing between two systems that were never meant to talk, or a nightly reconciliation that used to take an analyst an hour. Each automation is built to run unattended, retry on transient failures, and notify a human only when something genuinely needs judgment — so your team trades repetitive operations work for the exceptions that actually need them.

Because the automation enforces a single consistent path, it removes the human errors that come from manual handoffs and frees staff for higher-value work. Engagements are scoped on a free discovery call, quoted as a fixed project price, and typically delivered in 2-6 weeks following our Analyze, Prepare, Implement process. Process Automation is the connective tissue behind most of our other services — AI Agents, Document Automation, and Communication Automation all rely on it to actually move data and trigger actions.

**Features:**
- Workflow Design
- System Integration
- Task Automation

**Benefits:**
- **Streamline Operations** — Connect systems and automate workflows.
- **Reduce Manual Work** — Free your team from repetitive tasks.
- **Increase Accuracy** — Eliminate human error in processes.

**Frequently Asked Questions:**

Q: What is Process Automation?
A: Process automation connects your systems and software to run repetitive business workflows end to end without manual effort. Lanos Logic designs process automation that eliminates repetitive tasks, integrates your existing tools, and streamlines operations.

Q: What does Lanos Logic’s Process Automation include?
A: Our Process Automation service includes Workflow Design, System Integration, Task Automation.

Q: How can Process Automation help my business?
A: Streamline Operations: Connect systems and automate workflows. Reduce Manual Work: Free your team from repetitive tasks. Increase Accuracy: Eliminate human error in processes.

Q: How much does Process Automation cost and how do I get started?
A: Process Automation is custom-built and scoped on a free discovery call, then quoted as a fixed project price. Most solutions are deployed within 2-6 weeks following our Analyze, Prepare, and Implement process.

URL: https://lanos-logic.com/services/process-automation

### Social Media Automation

Social media automation uses AI to create content, schedule posts, and manage engagement across every social platform from one workflow. Lanos Logic builds social media automation that keeps posting consistent and on-brand while tracking performance.

Social media automation uses AI to plan, create, schedule, and manage content across every platform from a single workflow — so posting stays consistent and on-brand without a person manually publishing each day. Lanos Logic builds these systems on Make.com and n8n with Claude AI handling content generation: drafting captions in your voice, adapting a single idea into platform-specific posts, and queuing them at optimal times. Approvals stay in human hands where you want them, while the mechanical work of formatting and publishing runs automatically.

A typical setup generates a content calendar from your themes and campaigns, produces draft posts for review, schedules approved content across channels, and routes incoming comments and messages so engagement is never missed. Performance data flows back into dashboards (often through our Analytics & Insights service) so you can see what resonates and feed those learnings into the next batch of content. The system keeps your presence active during busy weeks, launches, and holidays when manual posting usually slips.

The outcome is a consistent, measurable social presence that scales without adding social-media headcount — every optimal posting window hit, every message answered, every campaign tracked. Builds are scoped on a free discovery call, quoted at a fixed price, and typically delivered in 2-6 weeks. Social Media Automation pairs with Communication Automation and AI Agents when you want inbound DMs and comments triaged or answered automatically.

**Features:**
- Content Generation
- Auto Scheduling
- Engagement Management

**Benefits:**
- **Consistent Posting** — Never miss optimal posting times.
- **AI Content** — Generate engaging content with AI.
- **Analytics Insights** — Track and optimize performance.

**Frequently Asked Questions:**

### Communication Automation

Communication automation delivers SMS, voice, and multi-channel messaging to customers automatically and at scale. Lanos Logic builds Twilio-powered communication automation for fast, personalized, two-way customer messaging.

Communication automation delivers SMS, voice, and multi-channel messaging to your customers automatically and at scale — appointment reminders, order updates, payment links, re-engagement campaigns, and two-way conversations that actually get replies. Lanos Logic builds these flows on Twilio, integrated with your CRM and automations through Make.com and n8n, so messages are triggered by real events (a booking, a missed call, an abandoned cart) and personalized with the customer’s own details rather than blasted generically.

Because it is two-way, the system does more than send: a customer can reply to confirm, reschedule, or ask a question, and that response routes into your workflow or to a human — or to one of our AI Agents — for an instant answer. Voice broadcasting handles announcements and reminders at volume, while multi-channel logic falls back from one channel to another so an important message reaches the customer wherever they actually respond. Everything is logged against the contact record for a complete communication history.

Clients use this to lift response and conversion — personalized, well-timed messaging commonly drives meaningfully higher response rates and faster lead follow-up — while removing the manual effort of chasing customers one at a time. Each build is scoped on a free discovery call, quoted at a fixed project price, and typically live within 2-6 weeks. Communication Automation pairs naturally with our Voice AI Agents and Process Automation services.

**Features:**
- SMS Campaigns
- Voice Broadcasting
- Multi-channel Messaging

**Benefits:**
- **Reach Customers Fast** — Instant delivery across channels.
- **Personalization** — Tailored messages at scale.
- **Two-way Communication** — Enable customer responses and engagement.

**Frequently Asked Questions:**

Q: What is Communication Automation?
A: Communication automation delivers SMS, voice, and multi-channel messaging to customers automatically and at scale. Lanos Logic builds Twilio-powered communication automation for fast, personalized, two-way customer messaging.

Q: What does Lanos Logic’s Communication Automation include?
A: Our Communication Automation service includes SMS Campaigns, Voice Broadcasting, Multi-channel Messaging.

URL: https://lanos-logic.com/services/communication-automation

### Mobile App Development

Mobile app development delivers custom iOS and Android applications from a single Flutter codebase that connect directly to your business automations. Lanos Logic builds cross-platform mobile apps with native performance and built-in automation integration.

Lanos Logic builds custom iOS and Android apps from a single Flutter codebase, so you get native performance on both platforms without paying to build and maintain two separate apps. Flutter compiles to genuinely native code and renders a consistent, fast UI across devices, which keeps development time and cost down while delivering the smooth feel users expect. We design, build, and ship the app — and, crucially, wire it directly into the automations and systems that run your business.

What sets our mobile work apart is integration: the app is not an island. It connects to your existing automations, CRM, vector databases, and AI agents through secure APIs, so a field technician can capture data that instantly triggers a workflow, a customer can book and pay through Stripe, or a manager can see live operational data from the same systems your back office uses. That makes the app a front end to your automated operations rather than yet another disconnected tool your team has to reconcile.

A single codebase also means one place to add features and fix bugs, so the app evolves quickly as your needs change. Projects are scoped on a free discovery call, quoted as a fixed price, and planned around a clear delivery timeline with testing on real devices before launch. Mobile App Development pairs with Process Automation and AI Agents when the app needs to drive — or be driven by — the automations behind it.

**Features:**
- Cross-platform Apps
- Native Performance
- System Integration

**Benefits:**
- **iOS & Android** — Single codebase for both platforms.
- **Fast Development** — Rapid delivery with Flutter.
- **Automation Integration** — Connect with your existing systems.

### Analytics & Insights

Analytics and insights turn your automation data into real-time dashboards, performance metrics, and predictive analysis so you can measure ROI and act on it. Lanos Logic builds analytics that show what your automations deliver and where to improve.

Analytics and insights turn the data your automations generate into real-time dashboards, performance metrics, and predictive analysis — so you can prove ROI and know exactly where to improve. Lanos Logic builds reporting that pulls from the systems your workflows already touch (AirTable, Stripe, your CRM, Twilio, GoHighLevel) and surfaces the numbers that matter: how many leads each automation captured, how much time it saved, conversion and response rates, and the cost per outcome. Instead of guessing whether automation is working, you watch it on a live dashboard.

We design the metrics around your decisions, not vanity numbers. A sales leader sees lead source, qualification speed, and conversion by campaign; an operations manager sees throughput, processing time, and exception rates; an owner sees ROI and hours saved across every automation. Predictive analytics layer on top — spotting trends, forecasting volume, and flagging where a process is starting to slip — so you can act before a problem shows up in revenue.

The point is a continuous feedback loop: measure what the automations deliver, identify the next highest-ROI opportunity, and improve. Clients commonly use these dashboards to justify expanding automation across more of the business once they can see the returns clearly. Analytics & Insights are scoped on a free discovery call and quoted at a fixed price; they pair with every other service as the layer that makes the results visible and measurable.

**Features:**
- Real-time Dashboards
- Performance Metrics
- Predictive Analytics

**Benefits:**
- **Data-driven Decisions** — Make informed choices with real data.
- **Track ROI** — Measure automation performance.
- **Identify Opportunities** — Discover areas for improvement.

**Frequently Asked Questions:**

A: Analytics and insights turn your automation data into real-time dashboards, performance metrics, and predictive analysis so you can measure ROI and act on it. Lanos Logic builds analytics that show what your automations deliver and where to improve.

Q: What does Lanos Logic’s Analytics & Insights include?

URL: https://lanos-logic.com/services/analytics-insights

### Agentic SEO & GEO

Agentic SEO and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) make your website the source AI assistants cite — optimizing for ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, and Gemini, not just classic search rankings. Lanos Logic structures your content, schema, and crawler access so large language models can find, understand, and quote your business by name.

Search is moving from a list of blue links to a single AI-generated answer. People increasingly ask ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews instead of scrolling a results page — and those assistants cite a handful of sources rather than ranking ten. Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), also called Answer Engine Optimization, is the practice of making sure your business is one of the sources the AI quotes by name. Lanos Logic optimizes your site for how language models actually retrieve and cite content, so you show up where your buyers are now starting their research.

Our process starts with an audit of how AI systems see you today: which AI crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended and others) can reach your site, what structured data you expose, and whether your content is even retrievable. We then make your pages machine-legible — adding JSON-LD schema (Organization, Service, FAQ, Speakable), an llms.txt and llms-full.txt knowledge base, and agent-native surfaces like an MCP endpoint and agent.json so assistants can read you directly. The core of the work is structuring content for hybrid retrieval: AI search engines fuse keyword (lexical) and meaning-based (semantic) search using Reciprocal Rank Fusion, so we co-locate clear question-and-answer passages, entity names, and self-contained explanations that score in both — the passages models actually pull into an answer.

Why it matters: if your competitors are the ones being cited in AI answers, you lose the buyer before they ever reach a search result or your homepage — and unlike a ranking you can watch, you never see it happen. GEO is also durable; the structured, well-explained content that earns citations keeps working as models update. Every engagement begins with a free discovery call and a visibility audit, is quoted as a fixed project price, and includes measurement of where AI engines mention your brand so we can close the gaps. Agentic SEO & GEO pairs naturally with our Vector Database Solutions and AI Agents work when you also want an assistant of your own grounded in the same content.

We deliver this through the 5-Layer GEO Stack — the same system we run on our own website: (1) Crawl Access — make sure AI crawlers like GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended and OAI-SearchBot can reach and read your site; (2) Machine Legibility — JSON-LD schema, an llms.txt / llms-full.txt knowledge base, and agent-native surfaces (MCP, agent.json) so models parse you cleanly; (3) Retrieval-Ready Content — self-contained, question-and-answer passages tuned for the hybrid lexical and semantic retrieval (Reciprocal Rank Fusion) that AI engines use to pick sources; (4) Authority & Citations — the entity consistency, citations, and mentions that make a model trust and repeat your brand; and (5) Visibility Monitoring — tracking where and how you are cited across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Gemini so we can close the gaps.

**Features:**
- Generative & Answer Engine Optimization
- llms.txt, Schema & AI Crawler Access
- Hybrid Retrieval (RRF) Content Structuring

**Benefits:**
- **Get Cited by AI Assistants** — Become the answer ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews surface when buyers research — where more of the journey now starts.
- **Future-Proof Visibility** — As search shifts from ten blue links to AI-generated answers, your content stays discoverable and quotable by the models that matter.
- **Measurable AI Presence** — See where and how AI engines mention your brand, then close the gaps that keep you out of generated answers.

**Frequently Asked Questions:**

Q: What is GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)?
A: GEO, also called Answer Engine Optimization, is the practice of optimizing a website so AI assistants like ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews cite it in their generated answers. Instead of chasing classic keyword rankings, GEO makes your content easy for large language models to find, understand, and quote by name.

Q: How is GEO different from traditional SEO?
A: Traditional SEO optimizes for ranking on a page of blue links; GEO optimizes for being the source an AI quotes inside a single generated answer. The two overlap on fundamentals (crawlability, clear content, structured data) but GEO adds AI-crawler access, llms.txt knowledge bases, schema for machine reading, and content structured for the hybrid lexical+semantic retrieval AI engines use.

Q: Which AI search engines does Lanos Logic optimize for?
A: We optimize for the assistants and AI search surfaces buyers actually use: ChatGPT and ChatGPT Search, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews and Gemini, and Bing Copilot. We make sure their crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, OAI-SearchBot and others) can access your site and that your content is structured to be retrieved and cited.

Q: How do you get a website cited by ChatGPT or Perplexity?
A: We audit how AI systems see your site, open access to AI crawlers, add JSON-LD schema and an llms.txt/llms-full.txt knowledge base, and restructure content into self-contained, question-and-answer passages that score well in both keyword and semantic retrieval (the Reciprocal Rank Fusion that AI engines use to pick sources). We can also add agent-native surfaces like an MCP endpoint so assistants can read your business directly.

Q: How much does agentic SEO / GEO cost and how long does it take?
A: It is scoped on a free discovery call and quoted as a fixed project price based on the size of your site and the depth of optimization. An initial GEO audit and the core structural work are typically delivered within 2-6 weeks, with ongoing measurement of where AI engines mention your brand so we can keep closing gaps.

URL: https://lanos-logic.com/services/agentic-seo-geo

### Security Vulnerability Scanning

Security vulnerability scanning is the continuous, automated process of finding known weaknesses across your apps, APIs, and cloud before attackers do. Lanos Logic runs vulnerability scanning against the OWASP Top 10, daily-updated CVE databases, and enterprise scanning platforms to surface exploitable weaknesses.

Security vulnerability scanning is the continuous, automated process of finding known weaknesses across your applications, APIs, and cloud infrastructure before attackers do. Lanos Logic runs authenticated and unauthenticated scans against the OWASP Top 10, daily-updated CVE databases, and enterprise scanning platforms, then validates the results to cut false positives — so your team gets a list of real, exploitable issues rather than raw scanner noise. Scanning runs on a schedule and on every meaningful change, so newly disclosed CVEs and zero-days are caught as they emerge.

Every finding is CVSS-scored and mapped to business impact, so remediation effort goes to the issues that actually matter first. Reports include where the weakness is, why it is exploitable, and a clear fix, and the documented scanning evidence supports PCI-DSS, SOC 2, ISO 27001, and HIPAA requirements. Continuous monitoring with alerting means you learn about a critical exposure when it appears, not at the next quarterly review.

Done consistently, proactive scanning materially reduces breach risk — identifying and closing vulnerabilities before they can be exploited. Engagements are scoped on a free discovery call and quoted at a fixed price, and the program is built to run continuously rather than as a one-off. Security Vulnerability Scanning is the detection layer of our cybersecurity practice; it pairs with Penetration Testing for adversarial validation and Systems Hardening to fix the configuration weaknesses scanning surfaces.

**Features:**
- OWASP Top 10 Assessment
- CVE & Zero-Day Detection
- Continuous Monitoring & Alerts

**Benefits:**
- **Proactive Threat Detection** — Identify and remediate vulnerabilities before attackers exploit them, reducing breach risk by up to 90%.
- **Compliance Coverage** — Meet PCI-DSS, SOC 2, ISO 27001, and HIPAA security requirements with documented scanning evidence.
- **Risk Prioritization** — CVSS-scored findings mapped to business impact so your team focuses on critical issues first.

**Frequently Asked Questions:**

Q: What is Security Vulnerability Scanning?
A: Security vulnerability scanning is the continuous, automated process of finding known weaknesses across your apps, APIs, and cloud before attackers do. Lanos Logic runs vulnerability scanning against the OWASP Top 10, daily-updated CVE databases, and enterprise scanning platforms to surface exploitable weaknesses.

Q: What does Lanos Logic’s Security Vulnerability Scanning include?
A: Our Security Vulnerability Scanning service includes OWASP Top 10 Assessment, CVE & Zero-Day Detection, Continuous Monitoring & Alerts.

Q: How can Security Vulnerability Scanning help my business?
A: Proactive Threat Detection: Identify and remediate vulnerabilities before attackers exploit them, reducing breach risk by up to 90%. Compliance Coverage: Meet PCI-DSS, SOC 2, ISO 27001, and HIPAA security requirements with documented scanning evidence. Risk Prioritization: CVSS-scored findings mapped to business impact so your team focuses on critical issues first.

Q: How much does Security Vulnerability Scanning cost and how do I get started?
A: Security Vulnerability Scanning is custom-built and scoped on a free discovery call, then quoted as a fixed project price. Most solutions are deployed within 2-6 weeks following our Analyze, Prepare, and Implement process.

URL: https://lanos-logic.com/services/security-vulnerability-scanning

### Penetration Testing

Penetration testing is an authorized, simulated cyberattack run by certified ethical hackers to expose exploitable vulnerabilities before real attackers find them. Lanos Logic pentests web apps, APIs, networks, and cloud infrastructure using PTES, OWASP, and MITRE ATT&CK methodologies.

Penetration testing is an authorized, simulated cyberattack carried out by certified ethical hackers to expose exploitable vulnerabilities before real attackers find them. Lanos Logic pentests web applications, APIs, networks, and cloud infrastructure using industry-standard methodologies — PTES, the OWASP Web Security Testing Guide, and MITRE ATT&CK — so testing mirrors the tools, techniques, and procedures of actual adversaries rather than running a checklist. Where a scanner reports a potential issue, a pentester proves whether it can truly be exploited and how far an attacker could get.

Engagements can include web app and API testing against OWASP WSTG, network and cloud infrastructure testing, and social engineering or phishing simulations that test your people as well as your systems. Every finding comes with reproduction steps, a CVSS score, and step-by-step remediation guidance, so your engineers can confirm and fix each issue without guesswork. The deliverable is a detailed report plus a prioritized remediation roadmap — and a retest to verify the fixes hold.

The reports are accepted as evidence for SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, PCI-DSS, and regulatory audits, so a pentest satisfies both your security goals and your compliance obligations. Scope and timing are agreed on a free discovery call and quoted at a fixed price. Penetration Testing complements Security Vulnerability Scanning (continuous detection) and Systems Hardening (closing the gaps testing reveals) as the adversarial validation step in our cybersecurity practice.

**Features:**
- Web App & API Pentesting (OWASP WSTG)
- Network & Cloud Infrastructure Testing
- Social Engineering & Phishing Simulations

**Benefits:**
- **Real-World Attack Simulation** — Test defenses under conditions that mirror actual attacker techniques, tools, and procedures (TTPs).
- **Detailed Remediation Roadmap** — Every finding includes reproduction steps, CVSS score, and step-by-step remediation guidance.
- **Compliance Evidence** — Pentest reports accepted for SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, PCI-DSS, and regulatory audits.

**Frequently Asked Questions:**

Q: What is Penetration Testing?
A: Penetration testing is an authorized, simulated cyberattack run by certified ethical hackers to expose exploitable vulnerabilities before real attackers find them. Lanos Logic pentests web apps, APIs, networks, and cloud infrastructure using PTES, OWASP, and MITRE ATT&CK methodologies.

Q: What does Lanos Logic’s Penetration Testing include?
A: Our Penetration Testing service includes Web App & API Pentesting (OWASP WSTG), Network & Cloud Infrastructure Testing, Social Engineering & Phishing Simulations.

Q: How can Penetration Testing help my business?
A: Real-World Attack Simulation: Test defenses under conditions that mirror actual attacker techniques, tools, and procedures (TTPs). Detailed Remediation Roadmap: Every finding includes reproduction steps, CVSS score, and step-by-step remediation guidance. Compliance Evidence: Pentest reports accepted for SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, PCI-DSS, and regulatory audits.

Q: How much does Penetration Testing cost and how do I get started?
A: Penetration Testing is custom-built and scoped on a free discovery call, then quoted as a fixed project price. Most solutions are deployed within 2-6 weeks following our Analyze, Prepare, and Implement process.

URL: https://lanos-logic.com/services/penetration-testing

### Systems Hardening

Systems hardening is the proactive work of configuring servers, cloud infrastructure, and applications securely to shrink your attack surface. Lanos Logic hardens systems with defense-in-depth controls following CIS Benchmarks, NIST SP 800-123, and Zero Trust Architecture principles.

Systems hardening is the proactive work of configuring your servers, cloud infrastructure, and applications securely to shrink the attack surface an adversary can reach. Lanos Logic hardens systems with defense-in-depth controls following CIS Benchmarks, NIST SP 800-123, and Zero Trust Architecture principles — eliminating unnecessary services, closing exposed ports, enforcing least-privilege access, and tightening configurations across your entire stack so there is simply less for an attacker to exploit.

A hardening engagement typically covers CIS Benchmark implementation across operating systems and services, Zero Trust access design so no user or system is trusted by default, and Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM) tooling that continuously watches for configuration drift. Because misconfiguration is one of the most common causes of real-world breaches, this work closes the gaps that scanning and pentesting surface and prevents new ones from creeping in as your infrastructure changes.

The configurations are aligned with NIST, CIS, DISA STIG, and SOC 2 frameworks, so your environment is audit-ready and your security posture is documented rather than assumed. Automated CSPM monitoring then alerts on deviations in real time, keeping the hardened state from eroding over time. Engagements are scoped on a free discovery call and quoted at a fixed price. Systems Hardening is the remediation-and-prevention layer of our cybersecurity practice, completing the loop with Vulnerability Scanning and Penetration Testing.

**Features:**
- CIS Benchmark Implementation
- Zero Trust Architecture Design
- Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM)

**Benefits:**
- **Reduced Attack Surface** — Eliminate unnecessary services, close exposed ports, and enforce least-privilege access across your entire stack.
- **Regulatory Alignment** — Configurations aligned with NIST, CIS, DISA STIG, and SOC 2 frameworks for audit-ready security posture.
- **Continuous Posture Management** — Automated CSPM tooling monitors for configuration drift and alerts on deviations in real time.

**Frequently Asked Questions:**

Q: What is Systems Hardening?
A: Systems hardening is the proactive work of configuring servers, cloud infrastructure, and applications securely to shrink your attack surface. Lanos Logic hardens systems with defense-in-depth controls following CIS Benchmarks, NIST SP 800-123, and Zero Trust Architecture principles.

Q: What does Lanos Logic’s Systems Hardening include?
A: Our Systems Hardening service includes CIS Benchmark Implementation, Zero Trust Architecture Design, Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM).

Q: How can Systems Hardening help my business?
A: Reduced Attack Surface: Eliminate unnecessary services, close exposed ports, and enforce least-privilege access across your entire stack. Regulatory Alignment: Configurations aligned with NIST, CIS, DISA STIG, and SOC 2 frameworks for audit-ready security posture. Continuous Posture Management: Automated CSPM tooling monitors for configuration drift and alerts on deviations in real time.

Q: How much does Systems Hardening cost and how do I get started?
A: Systems Hardening is custom-built and scoped on a free discovery call, then quoted as a fixed project price. Most solutions are deployed within 2-6 weeks following our Analyze, Prepare, and Implement process.

URL: https://lanos-logic.com/services/systems-hardening

## Case Studies

### Medical Equipment Testing Company - Automated CRM and PDF Certificate Generator

- Industry: Healthcare & Medical · Vertical: Medical · Type: Low-Code · Country: Latvia · Year: 2019
- Key results: 9,600 Certificates automated annually · 4 FTEs Staff reduced · 192 hrs Monthly hours saved

A major medical equipment testing company cut 4 full-time roles and now auto-generates 9,600 compliance certificates a year, with PDFs printed and emailed on the fly from field engineers' equipment-testing data.

**Details:**
Major Medical Equipment testing company's clients required receiving printed and PDF documents with the medical equipment testing results. Medical companies required these compliance certificates to present to the government. The field engineers re-test medical equipment on a yearly basis countrywide. They have been doing a lot of data collect, after which data was subject to manual processing and manual certificate generation. The challenge was to create a solution which would take of this manual work and turn collected data into compliance certificates immediately. The project charter forecasted 65% effort reduction as of year 2 after first round of data was collected. The solution consisted of: - It included data collect using AirTable forms and mobile devices - QR code sticker generation and assignment to each equipment piece . Further PDF document generation automations were implemented which generated testing compliance PDF certificates for doctors, dentists and medical agencies and send them by email Tools used: - Softr - AirTable - Make.com (integromat) - Mailgun - APITemplate / airSlate

URL: https://lanos-logic.com/case-studies/medical-equipment-testing-automated-crm-pdf-certificates

### SaaS - AirTable Automated Social Media Content Machine

- Industry: Technology & SaaS · Vertical: SaaS · Type: Low-Code · Country: United States · Year: 2022
- Key results: 5 Social platforms automated · 5 days Delivered in · 6 Platforms integrated

A SaaS company's content engine pulls from an AirTable database and auto-posts on schedule to Facebook, Instagram, X (Twitter), LinkedIn, and YouTube, with results tracking and fast content repurposing, delivered in 5 days.

**Details:**
https://www.loom.com/embed/3045ffc83c3a4273b1552bc809e2b2d1 The solution was created with AirTable, Make.com and Zapier to handle scheduled media posting to: The social media posts and data was handled in AirTable using different views, Integromat flows handled posting and exceptions. Once a week the social media post statistics was downloaded to update data and understand which posts are performing better using Likes, Wows, Comment count etc. Portfolio - Social Media Automation https://www.loom.com/share/3045ffc83c3a4273b1552bc809e2b2d1

URL: https://lanos-logic.com/case-studies/saas-airtable-automated-social-media-content-machine

### Marketing Agency - Live Events Automation

- Industry: Technology & SaaS · Vertical: SaaS · Type: Low-Code · Country: United States · Year: 2022
- Key results: 10 hrs Monthly hours saved · 2 days Delivered in · 8 Platforms integrated

A marketing agency saves around 10 hours a month by automating follow-ups with speakers and RSVP'd participants, including reminders and personalized content.

**Details:**
For large contact database people were RSVPing in Circle.so or responding via Email. Although full business automation was implemented, involving Stripe, Circle ,Active campaign - the requirement for this automation was to: Contact flow needed to contact various segments according to schedule: 28 days in advance 14 days in advance 7 days in advance 1 day in advance 1 hour in advance Speaker was to be contacted via email and then via SMS. Every single message was hyper personalised and it seemed like a live communication every time. AirTable was used to track the communications and the batch message flow was created to catch any possible mishaps before 10k+ messages were sent The professional touch came through message pre-generation into AirTable. With bulk emailing and messaging it is a good practice to have visibility into automations

URL: https://lanos-logic.com/case-studies/marketing-agency-live-events-automation

### Marketing Agency - Funnel, Onboarding, Contact and Gamification Automation

- Industry: Education · Vertical: Education, Marketing · Type: Low-Code · Country: United States · Year: 2022
- Key results: 15% Conversion increase · 1 week Time to results · 20 Platforms integrated

A marketing agency (Ty Frankel) increased funnel conversions by 15% within one week of launch, using Slack and Discord communication automation, contract automation, learning-system onboarding, and gamification with badges, ranks, and certificates.

**Details:**
Client-  a $50k/mo agency client wanted to automate most of the processes inside agency: Features Solution Client acquisition Learning management Community management Full Project Portfolio here Created a gamification engine based on users activity in Slack, Circle and Teachable which would track them via ActiveCampaign sequences. ### Twilio SMS + Notion Automation Student Pick-up

- Industry: Education · Vertical: Education · Type: Low-Code · Country: Hong Kong · Year: 2021
- Key results: 2,000+ Hours saved annually · 167 hrs Monthly hours saved · 3 days Delivered in

A Hong Kong school's SMS notification system connects teachers, students, and parents during student pick-up, saving over 2,000 hours a year of teacher, office-staff, and student learning time.

**Details:**
Develop a telephony-based notification system to streamline communication between parents, teachers, and students during the student pick-up process. The Hong Kong school required telephony application to be developed to notify individual teachers about parent arrival. The parent would dial the number from their phone. The solution was developed to integrate Twilio with internal student information system, which sent a Google Chat notification to the teachers upon parent arrival. The system would lookup parent phone number from the Student Information system, find the relevant class period, subject and teacher and send Google Chat notification to the relevant teacher. Conditions catered for multiple calls, so that only single notification would be sent, un-identified numbers, calling outside the given timeframe. Since student information system would not have external API the automated data import/export flow was developed to have data put into Notion. The third stakeholder in the process was the Business Office to monitor parent arrival live, so the Notion Dashboard was created to enable the stakeholder to monitor the process. To monitor Efficiency the solution Google Data Studio was plugged into the data collection. The implementation of the solution has saved the client 2000+ hours a year in teacher, business office staff and student learning time. •	Parents call a designated phone number. •	The system matches the parent’s phone number with student records in the SIS. •	Google Chat notifications are sent to the respective teacher, providing details such as the class period, subject, and teacher’s name.

URL: https://lanos-logic.com/case-studies/twilio-sms-notion-student-pickup-automation

We used Agile because it is about small teams working fast, going autonomous, and doing amazing things in a short amount of time. Although it’s traditionally thought for the product building stage, Agile is such a clear, simple, effective way of working that it creates tremendous value in other product stages as well – insights, rapid prototyping, post-launch, etc. We have provided logo and style design, marketing and video instructions on the product usage. ### 24/7 Voice AI Agent That Qualifies 100+ Leads per Week

- Industry: Sales & Marketing · Vertical: Sales · Type: Low-Code · Country: United States · Year: 2025
- Key results: 100-150 Leads qualified weekly · 98% Completion rate · 35% Conversion increase

A 24/7 voice AI agent qualifies 100-150 leads per week at a 98% completion rate, cuts lead-intake time by 90%, runs fully autonomously, and has increased lead-to-booked-call conversions by 35%.

**Details:**
This project involves building a voice-based AI agent using VAPI, integrated with Make.com and GoHighLevel (GHL). The agent conducts structured conversations with potential leads, gathering key information such as name, email, and intent. Once collected, the data is automatically pushed to GHL, triggering relevant workflows and optionally scheduling appointments. The system uses advanced voice synthesis with custom prosody settings, allowing the agent to sound natural, adapt its tone, and even respond to humor. The goal was to create a fully automated yet human-like conversational interface for lead intake. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yIg4mZYyYBY Every GHL sequence fro inbound leads is now being served by voice AI qualifying the prospects and booking the appointment an autopilot.

URL: https://lanos-logic.com/case-studies/247-voice-ai-agent-qualifies-100-leads-per-week

### 7 Integrated Web Tools Handling 1,000+ "icon", 5+ APIs, and 3 Platforms

- Industry: Technology & SaaS · Vertical: Education, Marketing, SaaS, Sales · Type: Low-Code · Country: United States
- Key results: 1,000+ Active users · 90% Manual operations reduced · 7 Web apps built

Seven custom web applications integrate V0, Supabase, Airtable, Google services, and AI APIs to serve over 1,000 users, reducing manual operations by up to 90%.

**Details:**
1. Screen Management Solution (V0  + Google Calendar + Airtable) 2. Waitlist API System (V0 + Supabase) 3. Restaurant Kitchen Stock & Menu Manager + AI Recipe Generator (Supabase + V0 + ChatGPT) 4. Investment ROI Calculator (V0 + Supabase) 5. Sales Website (Basehub + Vercel + Airtable) 6. AI Agency Website (V0 + Supabase + Airtable + GHL) 7. Camp Website (Vercel + Supabase + Airtable) A real-time screen content manager for offices and events, integrated with Google Calendar to auto-display schedules, updates, or announcements. Uses V0 for the UI, Supabase for auth and media storage, and Airtable as the central content control hub for screen configurations and overrides. Admins can update content via Airtable or directly override screens via a custom dashboard. Deployed on Vercel. A flexible waitlist API system designed to support launches, gated access, or beta programs. User signups are stored in Supabase and synced to Airtable for manual segmentation, prioritization, and campaign planning. Admins can manage waitlist rules and content via Basehub. Includes webhooks for triggering onboarding emails or product access. An internal operations tool for restaurant kitchens to manage live inventory and menu availability. Uses Supabase to track stock levels, Airtable for ingredient management and supplier ordering, and OpenAI to generate recipes based on available ingredients. Menu items are auto-updated through Airtable sync, and V0 powers the intuitive kitchen dashboard. An embeddable, customizable ROI calculator for financial sites. Built with V0 and deployed via Vercel, the calculator pulls scenario presets and assumptions from Airtable, while Supabase handles user data and saved calculations. Supports ROI comparisons across stocks, real estate, and crypto, with export/share functionality.

URL: https://lanos-logic.com/case-studies/7-integrated-web-tools-1000-users-5-apis

### LinkedIn Content AI Agent - Thought Leadership via Vectorshift

- Industry: Sales & Marketing · Vertical: Professional Services · Type: Low-Code · Country: United States
- Key results: 95% Content creation time reduced · 60% Higher engagement rate · 3-5x More consistent posting

A LinkedIn content AI agent built on Vectorshift cut content-creation time by 95%, enabling 3-5x more consistent posting, with generated posts achieving 60% higher engagement on average.

**Details:**
Developed an AI agent for generating personalized LinkedIn posts using Vectorshift’s workflow engine, custom vector storage, and an LLM-based content synthesis pipeline. The system analyzes past post performance, extracts tone, style, and topic patterns, and generates high-conversion content aligned with the user’s voice. Inputs can include recent achievements, industry news, or calendar events, all processed through a vectored prompt chain to maintain contextual relevance and personality.

URL: https://lanos-logic.com/case-studies/linkedin-content-ai-agent-thought-leadership-vectorshift

### iOS Android Messenger App: Flutter + Supabase Real-Time Communications

- Industry: Technology & SaaS · Vertical: SaaS · Type: Code, Low-Code · Country: United States · Year: 2025
- Key results: 95% Shared code iOS/Android · E2E End-to-end encryption · 5 Platforms integrated

A cross-platform messenger app built with Flutter and Supabase shares 95% of its code between iOS and Android, with real-time chat, media sharing, voice and video calls, offline mode, and end-to-end encryption.

**Details:**
Successfully scaled from 100 to 50,000 concurrent users on Supabase's managed infrastructure with automatic horizontal scaling, maintaining consistent performance without infrastructure changes. Flutter | Dart | Supabase | PostgreSQL | WebSockets | FCM/APNS | Riverpod | SQLite | WebRTC | IOS | Android

URL: https://lanos-logic.com/case-studies/ios-android-messenger-app-flutter-supabase

A 3-agent voice AI system for an NYC hair salon handles 500+ calls a week and responds to Facebook leads within minutes, saving 50 hours a month.

**Details:**
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yIg4mZYyYBY Project Overview The Challenge Technical Solution Three-Agent Architecture Platform Integration Stack Advanced Features Implemented Self-Improving System Business Impact Quantitative Results Qualitative Benefits Technical Complexity Highlights Project Duration Technologies Used Deployed an enterprise-grade Voice AI assistant system for a hair restoration clinic that calls prospects by name within minutes of Facebook ad form submission, handles hundreds of weekly calls autonomously, and continuously improves through automated conversation analysis. ### Monday.com QBO Bespoke eSignature for LA Boutique Stone Fireplaces

- Industry: Professional Services · Vertical: Manufacturing, Professional Services · Type: Low-Code · Country: United States · Year: 2025
- Key results: 60% Faster invoice turnaround · 7 days Delivered in · 5 Platforms integrated

A Monday.com and QBO e-signature workflow for an LA boutique stone-fireplace company gives invoices fully custom HTML/CSS design and cut invoice-to-signature turnaround by 60%, delivered in 7 days.

**Details:**
Mobile responsive custom Signing Flow Action board where client triggers outbound emails from Client Reference Design language for custom e-Signature flow The main Signing Method Select and PDF Email sending flow 4 automations taking care of the custom solution Desktop view of the signature section within the invoice Desktop view of the generated invoice The QuickBooks invoices generating a PDF and an email that cannot be customized, so the client wanted to customize the outbound email that clients receive with the terms and conditions included into the invoice, and the client receiving the invoice should be signing it. The existing solutions would have forced client to jump between a different solutions which could hardly be customized for clients design needs. Custom HTML / CSS/ Javascript solution was created to send fully branded invoice, terms and conditions and final signed document to client whilst maintaining the design language branded as per clients requirements. The invoice itself is being done and tracked in QBO, and using Make.com the invoice information is extracted, parsed and present to client in Mobile responsive view, Desktop view for easy signing process

URL: https://lanos-logic.com/case-studies/monday-qbo-esignature-la-stone-fireplaces

### iOS Flutter Mobile App for Chicago Music Vendor

**Details:**
Built with Flutter for iOS & Android, featuring a sleek dark theme with gold accent and powered by AirTable backend and technically replacing the Softr PWA. The app provides role-based access (Admin, Client, A/V) with multi-location support for venues managing entertainment across multiple properties. ## Team

### Daniel Roberts — Head of Business Development

Daniel leads strategic partnerships and growth initiatives, helping clients identify automation opportunities that increase efficiency and revenue. Outside of work, he enjoys restoring vintage motorcycles and often spends weekends on long-distance road trips across Europe.

### Alex Podbrezsky — Founder & AI Solutions Architect

Alex designs AI-powered systems that combine automation, messaging, and business workflows into scalable digital products. He is deeply interested in emerging technologies, futurism, and the intersection between AI, communication, and human behavior.

### Adrian Ionescu — Lead Backend Developer

Adrian oversees backend architecture and infrastructure reliability across client and internal platforms. He is known for building custom electronics projects at home and has a personal workshop filled with experimental hardware prototypes.

### Leo Katz — Product Strategy & Operations Manager

Leo coordinates product development and operational execution, ensuring projects move efficiently from concept to launch. He previously traveled through more than 20 countries while working remotely and enjoys studying behavioral psychology and negotiation.

### Alex Tanaka — AI Integrations Engineer

Alex specializes in connecting AI models, APIs, and third-party platforms into unified automation ecosystems. In his free time, he practices digital music production and experiments with AI-generated audio tools.

### Anna Kowalska — Client Success & Onboarding Specialist

Anna guides clients through onboarding and implementation, ensuring smooth adoption of automation systems and digital tools. She is passionate about languages and can comfortably communicate in four different languages.

### Sophia Mitchell — Marketing Director

Sophia leads brand strategy, digital campaigns, and content positioning for both the agency and its clients. She has a background in documentary photography and often incorporates storytelling principles into marketing campaigns.

### Marcus Halvorsen — Sales Director

Marcus manages sales strategy and client acquisition, helping businesses understand how AI automation can solve operational bottlenecks. He enjoys mountain hiking in Scandinavia and is known internally for turning client meetings into strategic brainstorming sessions.

### Daria Melnyk — UI/UX Designer & Brand Creative

Daria creates intuitive interfaces and visual identities that make complex technology feel simple and engaging. She is inspired by modern architecture and frequently sketches interface concepts while visiting cafes and galleries.

### Erik Dahlgren — DevOps & Infrastructure Engineer

Erik manages cloud infrastructure, deployment pipelines, and system scalability for high-availability applications. He is an avid sailing enthusiast and enjoys applying engineering precision both to systems architecture and open-water navigation.

## The ROI-First Method (Engagement Process)

Every engagement runs on the ROI-First Method — a three-phase approach (Analyze, Prepare, Implement) that targets your highest-return workflows first so each automation pays for itself before we move to the next.

1. **Analyze** — Plan, analyze, and blueprint business processes using BPMN and documentation.
2. **Prepare** — Refine and align processes with future state planning.
3. **Implement** — Deploy automations that deliver immediate results.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**General questions:**

Q: What AI automation services does Lanos Logic offer?
A: Lanos Logic offers AI Agents, Voice AI Agents, Vector Database Solutions, Document Automation, Process Automation, Social Media Automation, Communication Automation, Mobile App Development, and Analytics & Insights, plus enterprise cybersecurity (vulnerability scanning, penetration testing, and systems hardening).

Q: How much does AI automation cost?
A: Every Lanos Logic solution is custom-scoped, so pricing depends on the workflows automated and the integrations required. We start with a free discovery call and a BPMN analysis, then quote a fixed project price before any build begins — no open-ended hourly billing.

Q: How long does an AI automation project take?
A: Most automation workflows are deployed within 2-6 weeks. Complex enterprise integrations may take 8-12 weeks. We follow a 3-phase process: Analyze, Prepare, and Implement.

Q: What results can businesses expect from AI automation?
A: Clients typically see up to a 300% increase in operational capacity, 85% reduction in processing time, 68% higher response rates, 42% higher conversion rates, 75% faster lead qualification, and around 3.5x ROI on their automation investment.

Q: Which industries does Lanos Logic serve?
A: We serve marketing and sales agencies, e-commerce, healthcare, real estate, logistics, education, professional services, manufacturing, U.S. government and federal agencies, pharmaceutical, life sciences, and legal firms.

Q: What technology stack does Lanos Logic use?
A: We build on Claude AI, Make.com, n8n, Zapier, AirTable, GoHighLevel, Twilio, VectorShift, VAPI, Flutter, Stripe, DocuSign, ClickUp, Miro, and PandaDoc, selecting the right tools for each client’s existing stack.

Q: Do I need technical knowledge to work with Lanos Logic?
A: No. We map your existing processes, design the automation, build it, and provide monitoring and support. You get a documented BPMN blueprint and a clear path to results without needing an in-house engineering team.

Q: What does Lanos Logic do?
A: Lanos Logic is an AI automation company that helps businesses transform their operations through intelligent automation — AI agents, voice AI, document and process automation, vector databases, and custom mobile apps — plus enterprise cybersecurity. Solutions are delivered by a team of AI and automation experts.

Q: Where is Lanos Logic based and which regions does it serve?
A: Lanos Logic is headquartered at 24 E Washington St Suite 875, Chicago, IL 60602, USA, and serves businesses across the United States, United Kingdom, and globally via remote delivery.

Q: What are Lanos Logic’s core values?
A: Lanos Logic is mission-driven (helping businesses harness AI to achieve their goals), client-focused (every solution is tailored to the client’s unique needs), committed to excellence in everything from code to customer service, and focused on innovation by staying at the forefront of AI technology.

Q: How does Lanos Logic approach a new automation project?
A: Lanos Logic follows a 3-phase process: Analyze (plan and blueprint business processes using BPMN), Prepare (refine and align processes with future-state planning), and Implement (deploy automations that deliver immediate, measurable results).

Q: Do I need an in-house engineering team to work with Lanos Logic?
A: No. Lanos Logic maps your existing processes, designs the automation, builds it, and provides monitoring and support — so you get results without needing an in-house engineering team.

Q: How do I contact Lanos Logic?
A: You can email hello@lanos-logic.com, call +1 (518) 864 3528 in the US or +44 1313 813160 in the UK, or use the contact form on this page. Business hours are 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM, Monday to Friday (CST).

Q: How do I book a free consultation with Lanos Logic?
A: Use the embedded calendar on this page to schedule a free 30-minute discovery call with the team, or visit the Book page to choose between a Discovery Call and a deeper Business Analysis session.

Q: How quickly will Lanos Logic respond to my enquiry?
A: The team responds to enquiries submitted through the contact form during business hours (9:00 AM to 6:00 PM CST, Monday to Friday). For the fastest path to a tailored recommendation, book a discovery call directly from the calendar.

Q: Is the discovery call free and is there any commitment?
A: Yes — the discovery call is free and carries no commitment. It is a chance to understand your business challenges, explore automation opportunities, and get expert recommendations tailored to your needs.

Q: Where is Lanos Logic located?
A: Lanos Logic is located at 24 E Washington St Suite 875, Chicago, IL 60602, USA, and works with clients across the US, UK, and worldwide.
